checks.name: Claude Code CLI config

checks.name: Generic config

checks.name: Key shortcut requires full key
checks.detail: 点击 'pk_52b90••••' 按钮 → 输入框显示掩码，toast 提示 '请在上方输入框中粘贴完整的 API Key'

checks.name: Copy guard
checks.detail: 掩码状态下点击复制按钮 → toast 显示 '请先输入 API Key'，配置未复制

checks.name: Key list API
